arts.ttl: Chelsea receive HUGE transfer update over 'best player in the world'
arts.sum: Andrey Santos will reportedly be given the chance to impress Enzo Maresca at this summer’s Club World Cup as he is set to be included in Chelsea ’s squad for the inaugural tournament. Chelsea are yet to finalise whether Santos will be included in their first-team squad for next season, despite his immense displays for Strasbourg, and they will reportedly not make a final decision on his future until after the 2024-25 campaign.

arts.ttl: ‘Especially Chelsea’ – Blues set for fight with Antonio Conte for player, Premier League his likeliest destination
arts.sum: Chelsea could be set for a battle with former manager Antonio Conte for Borussia Dortmund star Serhou Guirassy this summer. That’s according to journalist Maurizio Russo, who reports that the Premier League are focused on Guirassy and ‘especially Chelsea’. arts.ttl: Chelsea emerge as clear favourites to sign winger who Jadon Sancho says is a ‘baller’ - journalist
arts.sum: Fresh transfer speculation has named Chelsea as the frontrunners in the race to sign a talented winger this summer. Even though there are a number...

arts.ttl: Chelsea’s decision makers and Enzo Maresca hit new low with ratings verdict – opinion
arts.sum: We all know how bad Robert Sanchez is and we are all angry and completely puzzled as to why the manager keeps picking him, and why the club have not already replaced him with a top new number one. This is probably THE worst situation and THE most baffling one at our club right now, […]

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Blues 'set asking price' for Renato Veiga amid Juventus interest
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly set an asking price for Renato Veiga amid suggestions that Juventus want to sign the Portugal international on a permanent deal.

arts.ttl: Barcelona make transfer decision on €100m Chelsea target
arts.sum: Barcelona have been linked with Benfica's sought-after striker Vangelis Pavlidis.

arts.ttl: Talks held this week: Chelsea make contact with Arsenal target’s representatives
arts.sum: Chelsea have reportedly already had some contacts over a potential transfer move for one of the biggest defensive prospects in the game. According to Simon Phillips, the Blues spoke this week with the representatives of Ajax wonderkid Jorrel Hato, who has also been tracked by Arsenal for some time. arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk to Chelsea transfer truth after major Liverpool contract decision made
arts.sum: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk has reportedly handed Chelsea a transfer blow after signing a new two-year deal with the Premier League side. However, they promptly moved away from the prospect as they got the feeling that he was going to sign a new contract at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Chelsea's bombshell Virgil van Dijk transfer bid and Liverpool star's honest response
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk has revealed he "always" intended to sign a new contract with Liverpool, despite Chelsea reportedly making a move to sign him on a free transfer

arts.ttl: Revealed: Van Dijk REJECTED Chelsea before signing new Liverpool contract
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly explored the possibility of signing Virgil van Dijk on a free transfer this summer before he agreed a new contract with Liverpool . Following confirmation of his new deal at Liverpool, Van Dijk told the club’s website : “I’m very happy, very proud.
